components.text:
There are 2 types of skills! 

$(b)Active Skills$(/b)
Active Skills are the skills you your self cast!

$(b)Passive Skills$(/b)
Passive Skills are the ones that are mostly always active!

In order to get skills you have to first get a $(b)$(el:cultinfo/techniques)Technique$(/el)$(/b) and then start cultivating! 

They will give you skills when you breakthrough to certain realms!
